expenses.pageSubtitle: Track operational costs, salaries, student support, maintenance, and every school expense with a full audit trail.
expenses.voidConfirm: Void this expense record? The audit trail will be preserved.
expenses.voidReasonPlaceholder: Enter the reason for voiding this expense...

expenses.approvalPageSubtitle: Review and approve expenses submitted by the finance team. Approved records are locked from further editing.
expenses.selectExpenseAudit: Select an expense to inspect its audit trail.
expenses.financeManagerLimitDesc: Finance managers can approve expenses up to this amount. Set to 0 to disable delegation. Expenses above this limit require administrator approval.
expenses.delegationDisabled: Delegation disabled — only administrators can approve expenses
expenses.approvalLimitBannerDetail: Expenses at or below this amount can be approved by you; larger expenses require administrator approval.
expenses.noApprovalLimitConfigured: No approval limit has been configured by your administrator. You cannot approve expenses at this time.
